title: Middle Eastern Turkey Kebabs
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring marinated turkey and sweet pomegranate glaze, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, salt, and pomegranate molasses.
3. Add the turkey cubes to the marinade and toss to coat. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
4. Thread the marinated turkey onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the turkey is cooked through.
7. Brush with pomegranate glaze during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
8. Serve hot with additional pomegranate glaze on the side.
